notes: Their main damage was hero_id:-1 (32k physical); 3/5 of you itemized armor.
Enemy ran 3/5 on or near their meta core.

closingNote: Closed slow — you led objectives but the game ran 42 minutes. Convert Fangtooth/tower leads into ending the game, don't farm the lead and risk a throw.

coaching.headline: You won all eight fights and they won none — but only three cashed into a prize, and that's how an 8–5 tower lead ran 42 minutes.
coaching.team: The fighting was never the problem: eight clustered fights, eight wins, zero losses — the enemy's entire game was solo catches (seven of you caught rotating alone; they never won a fight). The story is the cash-in: five of your wins (19.7, 24.9, 34.5, 41.2, 41.8) turned into nothing within 90 seconds, and at 41.2 you were still winning fights at your own inhibitor and core. The wins you did convert — Fangtooth at 24 after the 23.0 fight, Fangtooth at 32 after the 31.0 defense, Primal Fangtooth at 40 after 39.1 — are what finally broke them. Repeat the fight discipline; the one sharpen is treating the 90 seconds after a won fight as tower time, and cutting the solo picks — the catches at 27, 27.8 and 29.9 (three of you, alone, in under three minutes) are exactly the stall that kept a beaten team alive.
coaching.whatShiftedIt: Fight conversion, eventually: cashing 23.0 into Fangtooth at 24, 31.0 into Fangtooth at 32 and 39.1 into Primal Fangtooth at 40 — plus Orb Prime at 34 — ended a game that eight fight wins should have ended sooner; the five uncashed wins are the 42 minutes.

perPlayer.16f28434-561f-4f23-9454-40321f4a1ef3: Steel with zero deaths, 16 assists and 15 wards — nothing to fix in the fights, and you never gave them a body all game. The sharpen is the close: five fight wins bought no prize, and with your lane read yours early you're the one free to lead the group onto a tower in those 90 seconds — towers only ran 8–5 across 42 minutes.
perPlayer.a0c393cc-1437-4bdc-8168-64676ce2166c: Sparrow 10/3/5 at 1188 hero damage/min against your 901 norm, in a carry lane that read theirs all game against Murdock — you beat the matchup read outright. Two of your three deaths were solo catches outside any fight (Murdock at 9.3, Zarus at 27.8), and the 27.8 one sat in the 27–29.9 stretch of three solo picks that stalled the push. Rotate with a body next to you and this ends well before 42.
perPlayer.10edbf65-457d-48d0-9151-9df5b4fcb40a: Phase 2/2/14 with 23 wards against your 10 norm — that vision is a big part of why they never won a fight. The sharpen: you see the map best, so own the cash-in call — after wins like 19.7 and 24.9 nothing fell within 90 seconds. Call the tower while they're dead and the 42-minute win is a 30-minute one.

threats: Chain-CC risk (3 hard-CC abilities, ~2.5s of lockdown): Riktor Riplash (pull), Riktor Shock Therapy (silence 0.8s), Riktor Skewer (suppress 1.25s). Don't group tight into it — stagger the engage and hold mobility/cleanse for the key one.
Heal-stacking: Riktor. Anti-heal is mandatory against this comp — you brought none.
synergy: Little hard CC on your side — you can't force a pick. Play for poke/objectives and punish their cooldowns, don't flip coin-toss 5v5s.
You have sustain (Phase) — favor the longer fight where your heals out-grind them.
Strong AoE/teamfight kit — group at choke points and fight on top of objectives.

ourKits.combo: Bull Rush knockback → Force Shield wall → Shield Slam knockup+stun ult, Shield Bash %hp
ourKits.winCondition: peel the carry with walls/knockups or engage with Shield Slam
ourKits.playWith: a carry he can wall for and peel
ourKits.playAgainst: his Force Shield blocks projectiles — reposition around it; bait Shield Slam

ourKits.combo: Reaping Dash → Hamstring slows → Safeguard spellshield → Earth Shatter execute
ourKits.winCondition: trade with the spellshield up and execute low targets with Earth Shatter
ourKits.passive: permanent power on unique hero takedowns
ourKits.playWith: setup that holds a target for the execute
ourKits.playAgainst: bait Safeguard's spellshield before committing your key CC

ourKits.combo: Piercing Shot poke → Heightened Senses AS → Hail of Arrows zone → Inner Fire ult
ourKits.winCondition: ramp Relentless + AS and sustained-DPS the front down
ourKits.playWith: heavy peel — she's immobile and pure DPS
ourKits.playAgainst: she has zero escape — hard-engage her and she dies first

ourKits.combo: Telekinetic Link an ally → Psychic Flare blind → Energy Lance → Hyperflux buff ult
ourKits.winCondition: buff a hyper-carry through the Link and Hyperflux for a teamfight
ourKits.passive: abilities heal her and her linked ally
ourKits.playWith: the strongest carry to Link and supercharge
ourKits.playAgainst: kill the linked carry, not Phase; break the link timing

enemyKits.combo: Evade in → Barricade block → Spear of Nyr (execute <20%) → Coliseum ult arena
enemyKits.winCondition: trap a target in Coliseum and out-duel with stacked Gladiator
enemyKits.playWith: a team that joins him inside the Coliseum
enemyKits.playAgainst: don't fight him in his arena — disengage; burst through Barricade's window

enemyKits.combo: Static Trap root → Buckshot → Hot Pursuit AS → Long Arm of the Law global snipe
enemyKits.winCondition: trap for the root, then out-range with Shots Fired and finish with the global ult
enemyKits.passive: every 5th basic is a long-range bonus shot
enemyKits.playWith: frontline/peel to protect his low mobility
enemyKits.playAgainst: almost no escape — engage past the trap and he dies

enemyKits.combo: Assault The Gates leap → Make Way armor shred → Sacred Oath empowered basic → Stone Forged Soul stasis ult
enemyKits.winCondition: front-line aggressively and reset the fight with the stasis heal
enemyKits.playWith: a team that fights while he soaks and stasis-resets
enemyKits.playAgainst: don't waste burst into his stasis — wait it out; anti-heal cuts the ult heal

enemyKits.combo: Riplash pull → Shock Therapy silence → Skewer suppress ult
enemyKits.winCondition: pull a target in and chain silence+suppress for a guaranteed kill
enemyKits.playWith: burst that deletes his pulled/suppressed target
enemyKits.playAgainst: respect Riplash range — stay spaced; cleanse/QSS the suppress

itemTimelineNote: estMin = first minute the role's measured median gold curve covers the cumulative inventory cost (slot order ≈ purchase order) — THEORY, no purchase timestamps in either API

fights.note: caught-out = deaths outside every clustered fight; costs/conversion use a 90s window over timeline majors (older film — no tower times; Fang/Prime/Orb only); itemGap counts participants' items est. online (median-gold model, THEORY)
